text_original: seriously great app for my mental condition... but please reduce the subscription cost... it'll be really helpful for people like me who are mentally struggling with complicated things...
text_zh: 这款应用对我的心理状况真的非常有帮助……但请降低订阅费用……对于像我这样正面临复杂心理困扰的人来说，这真的会很有帮助……
reply_original: Thank you so much for your 5-star review! We are truly honored to know Fantasia is helping you through tough times. Regarding the cost, we understand your situation. Maintaining high-quality AI involves high server costs, but we are exploring more ways to offer free rewards. Please share your thoughts with us at support@fantachat.ai!
reply_zh: 非常感谢您的五星好评！得知 Fantasia 正在陪伴您度过艰难时光，我们深感荣幸。关于费用问题，我们理解您的处境。维持高质量的 AI 运行涉及高昂的服务器成本，但我们正在探索更多提供免费奖励的方式。请通过 support@fantachat.ai 与我们分享您的想法！
